name: Debate
description: Two agents argue opposing positions. A third moderates and delivers a verdict.

phases.name: Frame
phases.prompt: State the question or decision to debate. Provide context.

phases.name: Opening Arguments
phases.prompt: Make your opening case. Be specific and evidence-based.

phases.name: Rebuttals
phases.prompt: Respond directly to the opposing argument. Where are they wrong? Provide your own independent analysis.

phases.name: Verdict
phases.prompt: Weigh both sides. Who made the stronger case? What is the recommended decision and why?
